message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

title "af sync strategy <u>ReferencePage</u>\nStrategy:\n1. AF_FOLLOWER_COARSE_FOLLOW\n2. AF_FOLLOWER_COMPLETE_FOLLOW\n3. AF_FOLLOWER_SEQUENTIAL_FOLLOW tuning file not contain"

participant "af_core" as af_core #lightgreen
participant "af_haf" as af_haf #lightgreen
participant "camxhafadapter" as camxhafadapter #lightgreen
participant "af_haf_default_mixer" as af_haf_default_mixer #lightgreen
participant "af_haf_follower" as af_haf_follower #red

box "Follower" #pink
participant af_haf_follower
end box

== how the follower create ==

af_core -> af_haf : af_haf_set_core_switch
af_haf -> camxhafadapter : pAlgo->set_parameters\ntype: AF_HAF_SET_PARAM_PEER_FOCUS_INFO
camxhafadapter -> af_haf_default_mixer : af_default_mixer_set_parameters
note over af_haf_default_mixer
if !master:
  pMixer->p_primary = pMixer->p_follower_algo
else
  pMixer->p_primary = pMixer->p_active_algo
end note
camxhafadapter <-- af_haf_default_mixer : return
af_haf <-- camxhafadapter : return

== af process monitor ==

af_core -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_process_monitor
note right of af_haf_follower #lightyellow
checked with Lester
for follower_monitor, has no different
for follower_search,
current we use LEGACY, and Direct mapping require module calibration data
end note

alt [lens_mapping_method = FOLLOWER_LEGACY_MAPPING]\n[lens_mapping_method = FOLLOWER_DIRECT_MAPPING]
end

af_core <-- af_haf_follower : return

== af process search ==

af_core -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_process_search
af_haf_follower -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_focus_converge
af_haf_follower <-- af_haf_follower

note right of af_haf_follower : just talk about the FOLLOWER_DIRECT_MAPPING

alt [case AF_FOLLOWER_COARSE_FOLLOW]
  af_haf_follower -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_focus_coarse_follow_dir_map
  af_haf_follower <-- af_haf_follower
  note right of af_haf_follower
  1. if Coarse search ongoing, Fine search not in process
     go to the target lenspos
  2. if enter fine search, setup fine search
     follower have seperate fine search Tuning Param
  end note
else [case AF_FOLLOWER_COMPLETE_FOLLOW]
  af_haf_follower -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_focus_complete_follow_dir_map
  af_haf_follower <-- af_haf_follower
  note right of af_haf_follower
  once master focusStatus is FOCUSED
  we directly set LensPos
  end note
else [case AF_FOLLOWER_SEQUENTIAL_FOLLOW]
  af_haf_follower -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_focus_sequential_follow_dir_map
  af_haf_follower <-- af_haf_follower
  note right of af_haf_follower
  just like COMPLETE_FOLLOW, but even master is focus done
  will do another fine search
  end note
end

af_haf_follower -> af_haf_follower : return
af_haf_follower <-- af_haf_follower

af_haf_follower -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_get_fine_range
af_haf_follower <-- af_haf_follower : return

af_haf_follower -> af_haf_follower : af_follower_populate_process_search_output
af_haf_follower <-- af_haf_follower : return

af_core <-- af_haf_follower : return

@enduml
```
